final:
module gpio_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire set,
    input wire clear,
    output reg gpio_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (set) begin
        gpio_out <= 1'b1;
    end else if (clear) begin
        gpio_out <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
